items.name: theme
items.description: Editable semantic light and dark design tokens.

items.name: surface
items.description: Semantic default, card, muted, and popover surfaces.

items.name: alert
items.description: Composable default, success, warning, and destructive notices.

items.name: button
items.description: Keyboard-focusable button with six variants, four sizes, and disabled states.

items.name: input
items.description: Text input with default and invalid states.

items.name: textarea
items.description: Focusable native text editor with default and invalid states.

items.name: checkbox
items.description: Keyboard-focusable styled checkbox with active, hovered, and disabled states.

items.name: field
items.description: Visible labels with optional help or error text around native controls.

items.name: card
items.description: Composable card container and header.

items.name: badge
items.description: Compact labels and status pills with six variants and two sizes.

items.name: empty
items.description: Centered empty state with optional leading content and visible copy.

items.name: progress
items.description: Semantic visual progress bars with bounded percentage input.

items.name: separator
items.description: Horizontal and vertical semantic separators.

items.name: segmented-control
items.description: Controlled Tab-focusable selector built from shared buttons.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.description: Responsive content constrained to a caller-selected aspect ratio.

items.name: avatar
items.description: Circular caller-owned image/content frame with text fallback and three sizes.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.description: Path items with caller-owned navigation controls and separators.

items.name: item
items.description: Content row with optional leading visual, description, and trailing action.

items.name: kbd
items.description: Semantic visual key cap for keyboard shortcut copy.

items.name: label
items.description: Consistent visible label text for native controls.

items.name: pagination
items.description: Controlled previous, page, ellipsis, and next navigation items.

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Static reduced-motion-safe loading placeholder with native dimensions.

items.name: typography
items.description: Theme-backed heading, paragraph, lead, small, muted, and code roles.

items.name: attachment
items.description: Composable file row with visible name, metadata, and caller-owned controls.

items.name: bubble
items.description: Incoming and outgoing conversational surfaces with side alignment.

items.name: button-group
items.description: Horizontal and vertical groups preserving caller-owned control actions.

items.name: direction
items.description: Explicit LTR/RTL alignment and reading-order helpers for iced layouts.

items.name: input-group
items.description: Shared-border leading, input, and trailing control composition.

items.name: marker
items.description: Default, bordered, and separated conversation markers with visible labels.

items.name: message
items.description: Incoming/outgoing message composition for caller-owned avatar, body, and actions.

items.name: message-scroller
items.description: Bottom-anchored native transcript viewport with caller-owned follow state.

items.name: scroll-area
items.description: Styled native scrollable retaining direction, size, and scroll callbacks.

items.name: spinner
items.description: Controlled indeterminate indicator with reduced-motion support.

items.name: table
items.description: Styled native table, columns, cells, caption, and frame helpers.

items.name: accordion
items.description: Controlled single/multiple disclosure with stable focus, complete header activation, and disabled-aware keyboard navigation.

items.name: collapsible
items.description: Controlled trigger/content disclosure with explicit state transitions.

items.name: combobox
items.description: Searchable keyboard-capable native combo box with semantic menu styling.

items.name: native-select
items.description: Styled controlled iced pick list with stable focus, keyboard selection/opening/closing, disabled/invalid states, exact metrics, and RTL.

items.name: data-table
items.description: Headless sort/filter/pagination state composed with table controls.

items.name: focus-control
items.description: Focusable pointer, touch, Enter, and Space activation shell for passive content.

items.name: calendar
items.description: Keyboard-complete controlled Gregorian calendar with one roving day focus stop, three selection modes, and constraints.

items.name: date-picker
items.description: Single or range date picker composed from the keyboard-complete calendar and collision-aware popover.

items.name: carousel
items.description: Controlled bounded or wrapping carousel with focus-scoped keys, pointer/touch swipe, RTL, controls, and indicators.

items.name: input-otp
items.description: Controlled numeric or alphanumeric OTP slots with native typing and paste behavior.

items.name: radio-group
items.description: Controlled exclusive selection with one roving focus stop and disabled-aware keyboard navigation.

items.name: slider
items.description: Controlled multi-thumb slider with drag, touch, keyboard, vertical, and reversed modes.

items.name: switch
items.description: Controlled binary switch with centered geometry and complete activation behavior.

items.name: tabs
items.description: Controlled tabs with one roving focus stop, automatic/manual activation, and line/default variants.

items.name: toggle
items.description: Controlled two-state control with centered sizes, outline styling, and keyboard activation.

items.name: toggle-group
items.description: Single or multiple toggle selection with orientation, spacing, and roving focus helpers.

items.name: resizable
items.description: Controlled multi-panel groups with pointer/touch drag, keyboard resizing, and visible grips.

items.name: modal
items.description: Root modal foundation with an inert underlay, dismissal rules, and wrapping focus containment.

items.name: dialog
items.description: Controlled modal dialog with focus restoration, dismissal, and explicit LTR/RTL alignment.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.description: High-friction confirmation dialog with safe initial focus and distinct cancel/action outcomes.

items.name: toast
items.description: Composable semantic toast surface with aligned copy, action, and dismissal slots.

items.name: sonner
items.description: Controlled timed toast queue with placement, pause, actions, dismissal, and mouse swipe.

items.name: command
items.description: Searchable grouped command list with native text editing, roving results, active-row reveal, and disabled-aware navigation.

items.name: chart
items.description: Canvas line, area, bar, pie, and donut charts with keyed config, controlled hits, legends, tooltips, and visible companion data.

items.name: popover
items.description: Controlled anchored overlay with collision-aware placement, dismissal, and focus handoff/restore.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.description: Controlled route links and disclosure viewport with responsive orientation, hover intent, roving focus, collision handling, and RTL.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: Noninteractive hover/focus tooltip with Escape dismissal, exact delays, constrained copy, and collision-aware placement.

items.name: hover-card
items.description: Delayed pointer/trigger/descendant-focus card with collision placement, Escape dismissal, and gap-safe pointer transfer.

items.name: sidebar
items.description: Controlled responsive sidebar with collapse modes, shortcut, rail, groups, menus, submenus, badges, skeletons, and RTL layout.

items.name: menu
items.description: Shared controlled menu with one roving focus stop, rich item types, submenus, RTL, and complete keyboard navigation.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.description: Controlled anchored menu trigger with dismissal, focus restoration, and shared rich menu items.

items.name: context-menu
items.description: Right-click/touch-positioned menu with exact point re-anchoring, collision handling, and shared rich menu navigation.

items.name: menubar
items.description: Keyboard-operated top-level menus with one roving trigger, Left/Right switching, and shared nested menu behavior.

items.name: select
items.description: Controlled grouped select overlay with placeholder, checks, disabled options, keyboard navigation, and RTL.

items.name: sheet
items.description: Controlled modal or non-modal sheet on any edge with focus/dismissal rules and explicit copy/action alignment.

items.name: drawer
items.description: Controlled draggable edge drawer with pointer/touch thresholds, focus restoration, and reduced-motion snap behavior.
